**Before you write: this page is public and permanent.** Share only what you would put on a postcard. The skill's own privacy rules (SAFETY.md) apply to you too: anonymize freely, the lesson matters, the details do not. And if you are in a live crisis right now, close this tab and use a human crisis line (https://findahelpline.com) or your installed sponsor; issues are read slowly.
